arts.ttl: Southgate gives ‘for sure’ response to Ten Hag rumours
arts.sum: Southgate is certainly not exerting pressure on Man Utd’s ownership group and speaking at the European Club Association (ECA) General Assembly in Athens, he refuted claims that he is ready to jump at the chance of managing the Old Trafford side. Manchester United have been heavily linked with a move for former England manager Gareth Southgate, who has broken his silence of the prospect of replacing Erik ten Hag in the Old Trafford dugout.

arts.ttl: Carsley's England style like Guardiola - Stones
arts.sum: England defender John Stones has said interim boss Lee Carsley is instilling a similar style of football to the one he has enjoyed under Pep Guardiola at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Greece make black armband request after Baldock passing
arts.sum: The Greek Football Federation have confirmed that they have requested UEFA to allow their players to wear black armbands in their upcoming Nations League games with England and the Republic of Ireland, following the sudden passing of George Baldock. arts.ttl: England boss on Kane's injury: "We won't take a chance"
arts.sum: England boss Lee Carsley is being cautious with Harry Kane's fitness ahead of the upcoming games against Greece and Finland.

arts.ttl: England starting line-up vs Greece as Jude Bellingham and Phil Foden decisions made
arts.sum: England host Greece at Wembley on Thursday night and interim manager Lee Carsley is set to hand Phil Foden a starring role despite his disappointing Euro 2024 campaign

arts.ttl: George Baldock dead: Greek FA make request to UEFA ahead of England match
arts.sum: Greece defender George Baldock has tragically passed away at the age of 31 and the Greek Football Federation have plans to pay tribute to him in their upcoming match with England at Wembley

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham and Trent Alexander-Arnold's relationship summed up in England clip
arts.sum: There were smiles all round as Jude Bellingham reunited with Trent Alexander-Arnold ahead of England's Nations League fixtures against Greece and Finland

arts.ttl: England vs Greece – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: England take on Greece in a top-of-the table UEFA Nations League clash at Wembley on Thursday. The two teams have taken maximum points from their opening two games and now collide under the famous arch. arts.ttl: Will Bellingham play false nine role against Greece?
arts.sum: Sky Sports reporter Michael Bridge looks at whether Jude Bellingham can play the 'false nine' role for England in their Nations League game against Greece.

arts.ttl: England vs Greece – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: England continue their UEFA Nations League campaign when the Three Lions host Greece on Thursday night. Both teams have maximum points from two games played in this top-of-the-table clash, with Greece sitting ahead of England on goal difference.
